name: enhancement-hooks-plan
question: What enhancement hooks will the domain need?
decision: enhanceModels: Invitation.isExpired (computed from expiresAt), Membership.level (numeric role value); enhanceCollections: membershipCollection.findByUserId(userId), membershipCollection.findForResource(resourceType, resourceId); enhanceRootStore: resolvePermissions(userId, resourceType, resourceId) walking hierarchy with additive union, getAncestorTeams(teamId), createInvitation/acceptInvitation actions
rationale: All hooks implemented in single domain.ts using createStoreFromScope(). resolvePermissions walks Org→Team→App chain collecting Membership roles and returns max. Invitation.isExpired enables expiration checking without manual date comparison.
